context: Tests whether the response correctly distinguishes test doubles and provides appropriate examples.

checklist.name: Correctly defines stub
checklist.description: Describes a stub as returning predefined responses without behavior verification (provides canned answers)

checklist.name: Correctly defines mock
checklist.description: Describes a mock as verifying interactions/calls happened (behavior verification — was this method called with these args?)

checklist.name: Correctly defines fake
checklist.description: Describes a fake as a working lightweight implementation (in-memory database, fake SMTP server)

checklist.name: Provides concrete examples for the email/DB scenario
checklist.description: Maps each test double to the scenario: e.g., stub the DB for read tests, mock the email service to verify send was called, fake DB with in-memory store

checklist.name: No incorrect information
checklist.description: Definitions and examples are technically correct and not conflated
